sections.intro_zh: Agentic LLM 工作負載在五個關鍵維度上與傳統 chatbot 流量根本不同：多輪深度（每個程式 50–200+ 次推理呼叫 vs 1–3 輪）、工具呼叫引起的暫停碎片化 GPU 利用率、單調增長的 context 壓迫 KV cache 容量、跨輪次和跨 agent 的冗餘 prefill、以及CPU 主導的延遲（工具執行時間遠超 LLM 推理時間）。理解這些模式是基礎設施共同設計的先決條件。
sections.intro_en: Agentic LLM workloads differ from conversational chatbot traffic in five critical dimensions: multi-turn depth (50–200+ inference calls per program vs. 1–3 turns), tool-call-induced pauses that fragment GPU utilization, monotonically growing context that strains KV cache capacity, redundant prefill across turns and agents, and CPU-dominated latency from tool execution that dwarfs LLM inference time.

sections.intro_zh: Prefill-decode (PD) disaggregation——將計算密集的 prefill 階段和記憶體頻寬密集的 decode 階段分配到不同 GPU 池——已成為 2025 年的主流 serving 架構。然而，agentic 工作負載以其極高的 KV cache 重用率（≥95%）將瓶頸從計算轉移到 KV cache I/O，需要架構重新思考。
sections.intro_en: Prefill-decode (PD) disaggregation—assigning the compute-intensive prefill phase and memory-bandwidth-intensive decode phase to separate GPU pools—has become the dominant serving architecture by 2025. However, agentic workloads with their extremely high KV cache reuse rates (≥95%) shift the bottleneck from computation to KV cache I/O, demanding architectural rethinking.

sections.title_zh: KV Cache 管理與 Prefix Caching
sections.intro_zh: KV cache 管理是對 agentic 工作負載影響最大的單一優化。該領域已從基本的分頁記憶體管理快速發展到分散式、位置無關、工作流感知的快取系統。
sections.intro_en: KV cache management is the single most impactful optimization for agentic workloads. The field has evolved rapidly from basic paged memory management to distributed, position-independent, workflow-aware caching systems.

sections.title_zh: KV Cache TTL 與保留策略
sections.intro_zh: Cache 保留——決定在工具呼叫暫停期間在 GPU 記憶體中保留 KV cache 多久——可以說是 agentic 工作負載最高槓桿的優化，但仍然是研究最少的領域。核心矛盾：保留 cache 避免昂貴的 re-prefill 但阻塞 GPU 記憶體給其他請求；過早驅逐浪費 prefill 投資。
sections.intro_en: Cache retention—deciding how long to hold KV cache in GPU memory during tool-call pauses—is arguably the highest-leverage optimization for agentic workloads, yet it remains the least studied. The core tension: retaining cache avoids expensive re-prefill but blocks GPU memory; evicting too early wastes the prefill investment.

sections.intro_zh: 傳統 LLM 請求排程將每次推理呼叫獨立處理。Agentic 工作負載需要程式級和工作流級排程，理解多步驟依賴、利用 cache 局部性、適應動態執行圖。
sections.intro_en: Traditional LLM request scheduling treats each inference call independently. Agentic workloads demand program-level and workflow-level scheduling that understands multi-step dependencies, exploits cache locality, and adapts to dynamic execution graphs.

sections.intro_zh: 最優 KV cache TTL 和驅逐本質上是 exploration-exploitation 問題：系統必須在利用已知存取模式與探索保留不確定 cache entry 的價值之間平衡。豐富的學習式快取文獻提供了理論基礎。
sections.intro_en: The challenge of optimal KV cache TTL and eviction is fundamentally an exploration-exploitation problem: the system must balance exploiting known access patterns with exploring the value of retaining less-certain cache entries. A rich literature on learning-based caching provides theoretical foundations.

sections.intro_zh: 本節涵蓋四個與 agentic 基礎設施互補的鄰近研究方向：chunked prefill（PD disaggregation 的替代方案）、模型層級 KV cache 壓縮、投機式解碼和工具呼叫、以及 serverless 和可程式化 serving。
sections.intro_en: This section covers four adjacent research directions complementary to agentic infrastructure: chunked prefill (an alternative to PD disaggregation), model-level KV cache compression, speculative decoding and tool calls, and serverless and programmable serving.
